name: ctxcarry
description: Portable project memory and handoff context for AI coding agents.

scripts.bench: pnpm run build && node --import tsx bench/report.ts
scripts.bench:compression: pnpm run build && node --import tsx bench/compression.bench.ts
scripts.bench:recall: pnpm run build && node --import tsx bench/recall.bench.ts
scripts.bench:e2e: pnpm run build && node --import tsx bench/e2e.bench.ts
scripts.bench:real: pnpm run build && node --import tsx bench/real-sessions.ts
scripts.bench:continuation: pnpm run build && node --import tsx bench/continuation.ts
